title: Void Demon pirate base
content:
{{Top|leg}}
[[File:Void_Demon_Pirate_Base.jpg|thumb|right|250px|[[Void Demons]] pirate base scheme]]
The '''Void Demon pirate base''', built by the [[Pirate/Legends|pirate]] group the [[Void Demons]], was the only permanent settlement on the [[Planetoid/Legends|planetoid]] [[Isen IV]]. It was designed to be hard to find and easy to defend. The difficulty of navigating the [[Asteroid field/Legends|asteroid belts]] of the [[Isen system/Legends|Isen system]] helped protect the base from exploring [[Starship/Legends|starships]] and wandering [[Tramp freighter/Legends|tramp freighters]]. The base's [[Computer/Legends|computer]] systems contained a complete log of every [[Asteroid/Legends|asteroid]] and meteor in the system that was constantly updated by miniature mobile [[Sensor/Legends|sensors]] scattered throughout the system. The base's personnel complement included forty-seven [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] [[Pilot/Legends|pilots]], 320 boarding troops, twenty-three administrative personnel, and 140 [[Droid/Legends|droids]]. In addition, the base was equipped with twelve [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] bays, one landing deck, and thirty-six starfighters of various types, along with the added protection of eight [[Laser cannon/Legends|laser cannons]] and three [[Turbolaser/Legends|turbolaser]] batteries.

==Sources==
*<!-- 1991-06-XX -->''[[Planets of the Galaxy, Volume One]]''
*<!-- 1994-11-XX -->''[[The Star Wars Planets Collection]]''
